name: Brunito
mission: The team's first fully student-built high-power rocket and first custom avionics flight — the foundation everything since has been built on.

subsystems.name: Avionics
subsystems.summary: First in-house flight computer and telemetry link.

subsystems.name: Airframe
subsystems.summary: Fiberglass body with plywood fin can.

results: Successfully launched and recovered at LoneStar 2025, reaching 5,100 ft. First successful custom-avionics flight for the team.
lessonsLearned: Telemetry dropouts past 4,000 ft drove the move to LoRa on MARV. The single-deployment recovery landed the vehicle far downrange, motivating dual-deployment for future builds.
